matches.summary: Türkiye's mobile revenue rose 6% in 2025 to $347 million, its highest annual total to date. Over the past six years, Turkish developer revenue has grown by 450% to $2.7 billion.
matches.title: Türkiye's domestic mobile revenue grew 6% to $347m in 2025

matches.summary: Nintendo of Europe has agreed to pay a €35 million fine after a French regulator found the company misled customers about Joy-Con drift defects on original Switch controllers.
matches.title: Nintendo of Europe agrees to pay €35m fine for Joy-Con drift defects

matches.summary: IO Interactive CEO Hakan Abrak says that the studio's recently-released 007 First Light is approaching three million copies sold, and while the game has yet to recoup its budget the goal is well below the $200 million budget previously reported. He says that co
matches.title: 007 First Light officially sells 2.7 million copies, "probably" at three million

matches.summary: Nintendo Switch 2 sales in Japan fell by 87% after a surge prior to the May 25 price increase.
matches.title: Switch 2 sales drop 87% in Japan following surge ahead of cost revisions

matches.summary:
In 2025, more than 212 million Americans ages 5 to 90 played video games, according to the latest Entertainment Software Association data.

matches.title: ESA's Stanley Pierre-Louis: Video games are the "most popular and successful form of entertainment" in the US
